creator: dominic_marks@btinternet.com
text:
This is a new port for Mutella. Mutella is a client for the
	Gnutella file sharing network.

Fix: 

Not Applicable.
How-To-Repeat: 
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	mutella
#	mutella/Makefile
#	mutella/distinfo
#	mutella/pkg-comment
#	mutella/pkg-descr
#	mutella/pkg-plist
#
echo c - mutella
mkdir -p mutella > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - mutella/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >mutella/Makefile << 'END-of-mutella/Makefile'
X#
X# Port Makefile for Mutella
X# Date Created:	2/12/2001
X# Whom:		Dominic Marks <dominic_marks@btinternet.com>
X#
X
XPORTNAME=		mutella
XPORTVERSION=	0.3.2
XCATEGORIES=		net
XMASTER_SITES=	http://prdownloads.sourceforge.net/mutella/
XMAINTAINER=		dominic_marks@btinternet.com
XUSE_GMAKE=		YES
XUSE_AUTOCONF=	YES
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-mutella/Makefile
echo x - mutella/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >mutella/distinfo << 'END-of-mutella/distinfo'
XMD5 (mutella-0.3.2.tar.gz) = 7f532217f53ac05b16db5422fec5261b
END-of-mutella/distinfo
echo x - mutella/pkg-comment
sed 's/^X//' >mutella/pkg-comment << 'END-of-mutella/pkg-comment'
XA command line Gnutella client
END-of-mutella/pkg-comment
echo x - mutella/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >mutella/pkg-descr << 'END-of-mutella/pkg-descr'
XThis is a port of Mutella. A command line client for the Gnutella file
Xsharing network.
X
XWWW: http://mutella.sourceforge.net/
X
X-- Dominic
Xdominic_marks@btinternet.com
END-of-mutella/pkg-descr
echo x - mutella/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >mutella/pkg-plist << 'END-of-mutella/pkg-plist'
Xbin/mutella
END-of-mutella/pkg-plist
exit
